transcript: Speaker A (AI): I go. Speaker B (Human): I went. Speaker A: I have. Speaker B: I had. Speaker A: I tell. Speaker B: I told. Speaker A: I know. Speaker B: I knew. Speaker A: I drive. Speaker B: I drove. Speaker A: I take. Speaker B: I took. Speaker A: I buy. Speaker B: I bought. Speaker A: I think. Speaker B: I thought. Speaker A: I make. Speaker B: I made. Speaker A: I eat. Speaker B: I ate. Speaker A: I sleep. Speaker B: I slept. Speaker A: I write. Speaker B: I wrote. Speaker A: वाओ, तुम्हारी इंग्लिश तो बहुत अच्छी है। तुमने इंग्लिश बोलना कहाँ से सीखा? [Wow, your English is very good. Where did you learn to speak English?] Speaker B: मैंने MySivi ऐप पर सीखा। [I learned on the MySivi app.] Speaker A: MySivi? Speaker B: हाँ। इसमें एक AI टीचर है जिसके साथ तुम डेली इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करके आराम से फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश बोलना सीख सकते हो। [Yes. It has an AI teacher with whom you can practice English daily and easily learn to speak fluent English.] Speaker A: महँगा तो नहीं है? [Is it not expensive?] Speaker B: नहीं नहीं। ट्रायल सिर्फ एक रुपये से शुरू होता है। [No, no. The trial starts at just one rupee.] Speaker A: फिर तो यह सबको लेना चाहिए। [Then everyone should get this.] Speaker B: Download MySivi app now.
on_screen_text: Present / Past / English Mastery Day 22 / I Go / I Went / I Have / I Had / I Tell / I Told / I Know / I Knew / I Drive / I Drove / I Take / I Took / I Buy / I Bought / I Think / I Thought / I Make / I Made / I Eat / I Ate / I Sleep / I Slept / I Write / I Wrote / TUMHARI TOH BAHUT ACCHI HAI TUMNE ENGLISH BOLNA KAHAN SE SEEKHA [Your English is very good, where did you learn to speak English?] / MySivi / HAAN ISME EK AI TEACHER HAI JISKE SAATH TUM DAILY PRACTICE KARKE AARAM SE FLUENT ENGLISH BOLNA SEEKH SAKTE HO [Yes, it has an AI teacher with whom you can practice daily and easily learn to speak fluent English] / MEHENGA TOH NAHI HAI [Is it not expensive?] / NAHI NAHI TRIAL SIRF EK RUPAYE SE SHURU HOTA HAI [No, no, the trial starts at just one rupee] / MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 / PHIR TOH YEH SABKO LENA CHAHIYE [Then everyone should get this] / MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: An AI avatar and a human practice English tenses in a split-screen format. The human attributes his fluency to the MySivi app's AI teacher. The ad promotes a 3-day trial for ₹1 and urges users to install the app.
